items.line_en: Quicks makes your car selling experience stress-free, safe and affordable.

coach.say: Quicks makes your car selling experience stress-free, safe and affordable.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Quicks makes your car selling experience stress-free, / safe and affordable.

items.line_en: The process is quite easy and is two simple steps to get registered as a car dealer with us.

coach.say: The process is quite easy and is two simple steps to get registered as a car dealer with us.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The process is quite easy and / is two simple steps to get registered as a car dealer with us.

items.line_en: First, log on to www.quicks.nz forward slash sign up.

coach.say: First, log on to www.quicks.nz forward slash sign up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: First, / log on to www.quicks.nz forward slash sign up.
Chunk it: Sign up as a user.

items.line_en: Then, upgrade your account to a business account.

coach.say: Then, upgrade your account to a business account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Then, / upgrade your account to a business account.

items.line_en: Enter your business details and submit your form.

coach.say: Enter your business details and submit your form.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Enter your business details and / submit your form.
Chunk it: And that's it! / You're done!
Chunk it: What are you waiting for?

items.line_en: Evertise your car with us today.
